gaps.description: code_exec tool — PRD specifies AsyncFunction eval; implementation uses quickjs-emscripten sandbox (browser-compatible but different mechanism)
file_read / file_write via AgenticFileSystem (browser-compatible, no Node fs)
Provider config: provider, apiKey, model, baseUrl, customProvider, systemPrompt
AgenticResult fields: answer, sources, images, codeResults, files, toolCalls, usage
provider='custom' skips apiKey validation — when baseUrl used without customProvider, apiKey still required (partial skip)
systemPrompt passed to provider system field
Missing/empty apiKey throws before network call for anthropic/openai
